Package in.co.rays.proj4.controller

Class CollegeCtl

java.lang.Object
javax.servlet.GenericServlet
javax.servlet.http.HttpServlet
in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CollegeCtl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, javax.servlet.Servlet, javax.servlet.ServletConfig
@WebServlet(name="CollegeCtl", urlPatterns="/ctl/CollegeCtl") public class CollegeCtl extends BaseCtl
CollegeCtl handles college-related operations such as adding, updating, validating, and displaying college data. It processes HTTP requests and interacts with CollegeModel to perform database operations. This controller extends BaseCtl.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Vinay
See Also:
